pages.title: Blaze
pages.text: $(rev)Corpus entry:$(warn) fragments torn from Blaze donors keep their cultural locomotion hints even when stitched elsewhere.

pages.title: Recorded anatomy
pages.text: Head plus blaze rod torso cluster — $(rev)no arm/legs tokens$(warn).

pages.title: Stitcher's marginalia
pages.text: $(rev)Torso:$(warn) smothers fire while worn — exceptional defensive graft.
